summary: Semantic search and intelligence over SEC EDGAR filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K).

tools.name: search_filings
tools.description: Semantic search across indexed SEC EDGAR filings; returns ranked passages with company, filing type, date and source. Free during alpha.

tools.name: list_companies
tools.description: List every company with indexed filings, including CIK and the count of indexed passages per company.

tools.name: get_filing
tools.description: Retrieve all indexed passages for one filing identified by its accession number.

tools.name: get_data_catalog
tools.description: Self-describe exactly what data is indexed: companies, filing types, date ranges and passage counts.
